name: Solana
description: Core Solana blockchain plugin for elizaOS, enabling token operations, trading, and DeFi integrations.

SOL_ADDRESS.label: Address
SOL_ADDRESS.help: The mint/contract address used to represent native SOL when interacting with token swap logic.

SOLANA_RPC_URL.label: Rpc Url
SOLANA_RPC_URL.help: The Solana RPC endpoint the application should connect to.

WALLET_SECRET_SALT.label: Secret Salt
WALLET_SECRET_SALT.help: Salt used to derive or encrypt the Solana wallet's secret key; required if the direct secret key is not provided.

WALLET_SECRET_KEY.label: Secret Key
WALLET_SECRET_KEY.help: Base58-encoded Solana wallet secret (private) key; required if WALLET_SECRET_SALT is not supplied.

WALLET_PUBLIC_KEY.label: Public Key
WALLET_PUBLIC_KEY.help: Base58-encoded Solana wallet public key corresponding to WALLET_SECRET_KEY.

SOLANA_PUBLIC_KEY.label: Public Key
SOLANA_PUBLIC_KEY.help: Alternative name accepted by runtime for the wallet's public key.

SLIPPAGE.label: Slippage
SLIPPAGE.help: Maximum acceptable slippage (likely as a percentage or basis points) for Solana swaps/transactions.

HELIUS_API_KEY.label: Api Key
HELIUS_API_KEY.help: API key for accessing the Helius Solana infrastructure services.

BIRDEYE_API_KEY.label: Api Key
BIRDEYE_API_KEY.help: API key for accessing Birdeye market data services.

SOLANA_PRIVATE_KEY.label: Private Key
SOLANA_PRIVATE_KEY.help: The Solana wallet private key in base58 or base64 format, used to create a Keypair when private key access is required.

WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY.label: Private Key
WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY.help: Alternative variable name for the Solana wallet private key in base58 or base64.
